hero.headline: Hicham Alaoui
hero.subline: Applied Data Scientist building production ML and decision systems for finance, risk, and analytics.

bullets: Built Python/SQL pipelines ingesting and reconciling market + reference data with feature engineering (returns, volatility, liquidity, factor signals) for reproducible rebalancing datasets.
Developed ML-based scoring/ranking frameworks combining constraint logic with predictive modeling; ran backtests and sensitivity analyses to assess performance, risk, and turnover trade-offs.
Delivered a production-control + observability layer (KPI tracking, automated reconciliation, governance) around rebalancing runs — reducing rework and strengthening operational reliability.
PFE: real-time pre-trade limits recalibration (12M+ trades) via EVT-POT model — 94% precision at 1.3% false-positive rate + MLOps deployment, enabling EUR 1.8M RWA release and 80% faster processing.
Developed risk and monitoring analytics for control-heavy trading environments.
Built reproducible data pipelines and reporting layers for exception analysis.
Packaged automation workflows for continuity using containerized deployment.
Built CO₂ emissions forecasting models (XGBoost, LSTM) on multi-source agricultural time series, with feature engineering and stakeholder-ready visualizations.
Developed an end-to-end NLP pipeline for French sustainability content — data prep, generation, and automated quality gating.
Benchmarked and evaluated ML models to validate key emission drivers across sub-sectors, framed for policy interpretation.
Packaged forecasting outputs into a lightweight Python API for scenario exploration and NGO decision support.

projects.name: Real-Time Pre-Trade Limits Recalibration using EVT
projects.problem: Pre-trade control thresholds were difficult to calibrate manually, creating a trade-off between excessive false alerts and insufficient risk sensitivity.
projects.approach: Built an EVT-POT based recalibration framework on 12M+ trades to estimate extreme behavior, propose dynamic thresholds, and package the workflow with testing, monitoring, and deployment logic.
impact: Analyzed 12M+ trades across the full pre-trade limit-monitoring perimeter at Societe Generale ATS
94% precision at 1.3% false-positive rate on extreme-event detection
Enabled EUR 1.8M RWA release through improved threshold accuracy
Reduced processing time by 80% versus the prior heuristic approach
Deployed to production with full MLOps stack: unit tests, Docker, GitHub Actions, monitoring hooks
highlights: Peak-Over-Threshold (POT/GPD) modeling for tail-risk behavior estimation
Backtesting and threshold comparison against heuristic benchmark rules
MLOps packaging with unit tests, Docker, GitHub Actions, and monitoring hooks
Business-oriented validation around false positives, risk sensitivity, and operational usability

projects.name: Index Rebalancing Control Platform
projects.problem: A business-critical rebalancing process depended on manual checks, creating control gaps and weak traceability.
projects.approach: Designed and implemented an Inputs → Run → Outputs platform with input validation, run logging, standardized dumps, mismatch detection, and KPI/KPA monitoring.
impact: Reduced manual control steps across rebalancing runs, cutting validation time significantly
Delivered full run traceability and audit-ready documentation for regulatory review
Created a repeatable exception framework that surfaced and prioritized recurring upstream data issues
highlights: Standardized workflow states from input intake to output validation
Implemented exception detection for mismatches and missing controls
Structured KPI/KPA monitoring for operational decision-making

projects.name: AI Pricing & Promotion Decision Engine
projects.problem: Commercial teams must decide what to promote, how deeply to discount, and how to balance unit sales, revenue, and margin under uncertain demand behavior.
projects.approach: Built an applied AI decision workflow: synthetic retail data generation, time-aware model benchmarking, demand-response prediction, counterfactual simulation, and constrained action ranking through a weighted objective.
impact: Converted pricing questions into a structured decision-support system
Connected ML forecasts to practical promotion action recommendations
Produced business-facing outputs through an interactive Streamlit dashboard
highlights: Generated a realistic synthetic environment covering seasonality, promotion effects, and price sensitivity
Benchmarked and tuned regression families using time-aware cross-validation
Designed a constraint-aware decision engine with scenario simulation and ranking logic

projects.name: Investment Copilot
projects.problem: Investment research is fragmented across data sources, scoring models, and execution platforms — making it slow to move from a signal to a tested position.
projects.approach: Built an end-to-end AI research platform combining Bloomberg/FactSet data ingestion, a LangChain agent for research automation, multi-factor stock scoring, and IBKR paper trading — all served through a Streamlit UI with local LLMs.
impact: Integrated Bloomberg and FactSet data into a unified research and scoring pipeline
Built a LangChain agent that automates equity research tasks with local LLM inference
Implemented multi-factor stock scoring combining fundamental, momentum, and risk signals
Connected the pipeline to Interactive Brokers paper trading for end-to-end signal testing
highlights: LangChain agent orchestration with tool use over live market data
Multi-factor scoring with configurable factor weights and ranking
IBKR paper trading integration for execution simulation
Local LLM inference — no external API dependency for research generation

projects.name: Modeling Agricultural CO2 Emissions in Switzerland
projects.problem: Agricultural emissions are driven by interdependent structural and environmental factors that are hard to model jointly.
projects.approach: Built predictive models combining agricultural, demographic, and climate features to analyze emission dynamics, benchmarking econometric and ML approaches for robustness.
impact: Identified livestock and fertilizer as primary emission drivers (68% of variance) across Swiss agricultural sub-sectors
Validated XGBoost and LSTM approaches against econometric benchmarks for robustness and interpretability
Packaged scenario-ready forecasts into a Python API for NGO policy exploration at gaea21
highlights: Integrated heterogeneous climate and structural datasets from multiple sources
Compared econometric and ML approaches for robustness and interpretability
Framed model outputs for policy-oriented interpretation (gaea21 NGO use case)

projects.name: Credit Card Fraud Detection with Imbalanced Learning
projects.problem: Severely imbalanced fraud data made baseline classifiers unreliable for risk-sensitive detection.
projects.approach: Benchmarked multiple classification models and applied oversampling to improve minority-class detection performance, with rigorous precision-recall evaluation.
impact: Achieved significant recall improvement on the minority fraud class using SMOTE + XGBoost versus a naive baseline
Built a reusable model comparison framework for class-imbalanced risk problems
Established rigorous precision-recall evaluation workflow applicable to operational risk detection
highlights: Compared classifier performance under class imbalance constraints
Applied SMOTE and oversampling workflows to improve minority signal capture
Tracked precision and recall trade-offs with operational relevance framing

projects.name: Tick-Movement Prediction with Machine Learning
projects.problem: Short-term directional prediction on derivatives signals is noisy and difficult to validate reliably.
projects.approach: Built an XGBoost time-series workflow with disciplined train, validation, and test splits plus regression-based evaluation.
impact: Built a reproducible signal prediction pipeline with 62% OOS directional accuracy on short-term equity signals
Validated via walk-forward cross-validation to eliminate leakage from temporal data structure
highlights: Engineered predictive features from raw market signals
Separated training and evaluation windows to reduce leakage risk

projects.name: AI Equity Selection & Portfolio Allocation Engine
projects.cardTitle: AI Equity Selection & Portfolio Allocation Engine
projects.problem: Converting large issuer and market datasets into coherent allocation decisions is slow and inconsistent.
projects.approach: Designed an AI-driven workflow linking research signals, issuer scoring, ranking logic, and portfolio weighting into one decision pipeline.
impact: Connected research outputs to allocation-ready decisions
Standardized scoring logic for portfolio design workflows
highlights: Structured signal ingestion across issuer and market inputs
Implemented ranking-to-weighting logic for portfolio construction

projects.name: Risk Analytics for Trading Controls and Limit Monitoring
projects.problem: Control teams needed faster visibility on threshold breaches, recurring exceptions, and escalation priorities.
projects.approach: Built monitoring analytics and reporting views to structure control signals, exception tracking, and escalation-ready analysis.
impact: Improved detection speed for critical control exceptions
Standardized monitoring views for recurring issues
highlights: Modeled control signals into a consistent analytics layer
Designed reporting outputs oriented to escalation decisions

projects.name: Prompt-to-Pipeline ETL Generator
projects.problem: Repeated ETL scaffolding slowed experimentation and delayed analytics delivery.
projects.approach: Designed a prompt-driven utility that generates standardized ETL skeletons with validation checkpoints.
impact: Accelerated early-stage pipeline prototyping
Reduced repetitive setup overhead for new workflows
highlights: Converted natural-language prompts into ETL starter components
Embedded validation hooks for data reliability from day one

projects.name: SkyFarms / FarmVision
projects.problem: Detecting crop stress early is difficult in variable field conditions with limited monitoring infrastructure.
projects.approach: Prototyped practical diagnostic workflows combining data capture, model inference, and operator-facing intervention logic.
impact: Validated startup experimentation in AI-assisted operations
Mapped real operational pain points to lightweight ML workflows
highlights: Designed data-to-inference loops for actionable diagnostics
Prioritized implementation simplicity for iterative deployment

about.narrative: I build machine learning and analytics systems that deliver measurable operational impact — across trading risk, index operations, commercial analytics, and sustainability. Working across these domains isn't breadth for its own sake: each sharpened a different modeling constraint — tail risk calibration, operational control, demand uncertainty, policy interpretation. Together, they've shaped a production-first approach: strong problem scoping, rigorous validation, and systems that hold up in regulated environments.
